chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 58 of 2015 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of main case. 06.05.2026 Ms. Afsheen Aman, advocate for the applicant. Per learned counsel the question before the court has already been decided against the applicant department inter alia by virtue of order dated 24.11.2020 passed in SCRA 334 of 2015 and connected matters. Learned counsel states that in view thereof, this reference application may be dismissed. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
